merged_prs.title: HGCal displaced gun validations
Phase2-hgx367N Correct the documentation of the versions in Configuration/Geometry
Fix ECAL DQM warnings about missing endcap collections in Phase 2

Update ECAL Phase 2 sample noise correlations

Fix HGCal HD 200um (type 3) handling in legacy digitizer ZS and v19 local reco constants

Move Phase2Muon type assignment to the main muon loop
[RECO] Changes to EventContent to make it RISCV64 compliant
Update `GeneralPurposeVertexAnalyzer` axes labels accordingly to track pT cut
Add `cudaKernelStackBudget` tool and richer CUDA device information
remove `CaloTriggerPrimitives_cff` import from `L1TCaloLayer1Summary_cff`
Prevent MPI deadlock after a configuration error
Implement `edmTypeInfo`
Correct compatible det propagation in `setSecondHitPattern`
TruthInfo: pileup-aware truth graph during mixing

Guard unguarded hitMap lookups in HGVHistoProducerAlgo

Add pre-selections to the Tau Validation.

Clamp the CLUE3D cluster radius variance at zero
